name: hydra-claude
description: Hydra Claude: token tracking, context compaction, and curated development agents and skills.

statusLine.command: SUMMARY="$HOME/.aspire-spark/token-summary.json"; if [ -f "$SUMMARY" ]; then jq -r '"↑" + (.total_input|tostring) + " ↓" + (.total_output|tostring) + " tokens"' "$SUMMARY" 2>/dev/null; else echo "Tokens: –"; fi
